canonical_definition: A multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate Theory of Mind capabilities in situated social interactions involving up to four agents in a grid world, covering cooperative, obstructive, and mixed settings.
papers: REVIVINGYOURMNEME: Predicting The Side Effects ofLLMUnlearning and Fine-Tuning via Sparse Model Diffing

relationships.paper: REVIVINGYOURMNEME: Predicting The Side Effects ofLLMUnlearning and Fine-Tuning via Sparse Model Diffing
relationships.evidence: We introduce ToM-SSI, the first evaluation benchmark that addresses all aforementioned limitations by evaluating ToM abilities in Situated Social Interactions (Section 1).
